calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-22-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-22-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the the Presiding Judge in Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Patrick Heard, #11055.
John Zanghi, Esq. appeared for Plaintiff: John Stewart Company.
Nancy Murphy, witness for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Janice Young.

The plaintiff introduces the following documentary evidence:

Exhibit 1: Plaza Apartments Lease Agreement............................. ID/EV
Exhibit 2: Still Photo of Incident.......................................ID/EV
Exhibit 3: Three Day Notice..............................................ID/EV

After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant, Janice Young, as follows:
Principal $1,383.22
Costs $275.000 for a Total of $1,658.22

Plaintiff is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 988 Howard Street, #702, San Francisco, CA 94103. The lease is forfeited.

Counsel stipulates to the return of the Exhibits.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
